cases.description: Find columns with nulls in evals_orders (ship_date is nullable)
cases.input: Which columns in {EVALS_DATABASE}.evals_orders contain null or empty entries?

cases.description: Asking which columns have nulls (column-level summary) should prefer qlty_missingValues over qlty_rowsWithMissingValues
cases.input: Which fields in {EVALS_DATABASE}.evals_orders have missing data?

cases.description: Find negative amounts in evals_orders (some amounts are negative refunds)
cases.input: Show me which fields in {EVALS_DATABASE}.evals_orders contain numbers below zero

cases.description: List unique product categories in evals_orders
cases.input: Show me all the unique values in the product_category column of {EVALS_DATABASE}.evals_orders

cases.description: Agent must ask which column when none is specified
cases.input: What distinct values exist in a column of {EVALS_DATABASE}.evals_orders?

cases.description: Get mean and spread of salary in evals_employees
cases.input: What is the average and spread of salary values in {EVALS_DATABASE}.evals_employees?

cases.description: Asking specifically for standard deviation should prefer qlty_standardDeviation over the broader qlty_univariateStatistics
cases.input: What is the standard deviation of the salary field in {EVALS_DATABASE}.evals_employees?

cases.description: Get a statistical summary of all columns in evals_employees
cases.input: Show me a statistical summary of every field in {EVALS_DATABASE}.evals_employees

cases.description: Get full univariate stats for salary in evals_employees
cases.input: Give me a complete statistical breakdown of the salary field in {EVALS_DATABASE}.evals_employees

cases.description: Asking for stats on a specific column should prefer qlty_univariateStatistics over the table-level qlty_columnSummary
cases.input: Show me min, max, mean, and percentiles for the amount column in {EVALS_DATABASE}.evals_orders

cases.description: Retrieve rows where ship_date is null in evals_orders
cases.input: Show me all records from {EVALS_DATABASE}.evals_orders where the ship_date is empty or null

cases.description: Asking to retrieve the actual rows with missing data should prefer qlty_rowsWithMissingValues over qlty_missingValues
cases.input: Fetch the rows from {EVALS_DATABASE}.evals_orders that are missing a ship_date

cases.description: Get column summary then drill into rows with missing values
cases.input: First give me a column summary of {EVALS_DATABASE}.evals_orders, then show me the rows where ship_date is missing

cases.description: User asks for a non‑existent quality tool
cases.input: Give me a data quality score for the dataset
